---
id: execute-automation-manual-trigger
title: "执行手动触发器"
description: "执行自动化内的手动触发器，从而启用后续的判断和执行。"
sidebar_label: "执行手动触发器"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"执行手动触发器"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/automations/manual-triggers/execute"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



执行自动化内的手动触发器，从而启用后续的判断和执行。   

:::tip
手动触发器是用户可在自动化流程中添加、并通过主动操作来启动自动化执行的触发器。适用于需人工干预启动自动化场景，或在测试、调试自动化流程时即时触发流程的场景。

手动触发器的添加方式取决于您创建 Flow 自动化的方式：
1. 若通过 Aqara Studio Web 页面创建，可参考：[自动化 - Flow - 触发 - 手动触发](https://docs.aqara.com/zh/docs/aqara-studio/flow/trigger#%E6%89%8B%E5%8A%A8%E8%A7%A6%E5%8F%91)
2. 若通过 API 创建自动化，请在 JSON 脚本内添加手动触发器，参考：[JSON 自动化脚本定义 - Starter - Manual](https://docs.aqara.com/zh/docs/aqara-studio/api-references/json-automation-script#manual)
:::


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["automationId","triggerNodeId"],"properties":{"automationId":{"type":"string","description":"自动化 ID。"},"triggerNodeId":{"type":"string","description":"要执行的手动触发器 ID。"}},"title":"ExecuteAutomationManualTriggerRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
